coverage_note: The bundled IFNG population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from IFNG Th1 cytokine signaling, macrophage activation, antigen presentation, JAK-STAT1 activation, and host-defense inflammation and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000111537: IFNG coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: IFNG findings should be read against Th1 cytokine signaling, macrophage activation, antigen presentation, JAK-STAT1 activation, and host-defense inflammation; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs2430561 (IFNG +874 T>A) is curated as a IFNG marker for Th1 immune activation context, Infectious disease and autoimmunity association research; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
